metadata.description: Universal TPC-H Query to Policy Mapping

orders.raw_sql:
SELECT o.*
FROM orders o
JOIN lineitem l
     ON l.l_orderkey = o.o_orderkey
GROUP BY o.o_orderkey,
         o.o_custkey,
         o.o_orderstatus,
         o.o_totalprice,
         o.o_orderdate,
         o.o_orderpriority,
         o.o_clerk,
         o.o_shippriority,
         o.o_comment
HAVING SUM(l.l_extendedprice * (1 - l.l_discount)) > 100000
orders.predicate: ( SELECT SUM(l.l_extendedprice * (1 - l.l_discount)) FROM lineitem l WHERE l.l_orderkey = o.o_orderkey ) > 100000

customer.raw_sql:
SELECT c.*
FROM customer c
WHERE EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM orders o
    JOIN lineitem l 
         ON l.l_orderkey = o.o_orderkey
    JOIN supplier s 
         ON s.s_suppkey = l.l_suppkey
    JOIN nation ns 
         ON ns.n_nationkey = s.s_nationkey
    JOIN nation nc 
         ON nc.n_nationkey = c.c_nationkey
    WHERE o.o_custkey = c.c_custkey
      AND ns.n_regionkey = nc.n_regionkey
      AND ns.n_nationkey <> nc.n_nationkey
)
customer.predicate:
EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM orders o
    JOIN lineitem l 
         ON l.l_orderkey = o.o_orderkey
    JOIN supplier s 
         ON s.s_suppkey = l.l_suppkey
    JOIN nation ns 
         ON ns.n_nationkey = s.s_nationkey
    JOIN nation nc 
         ON nc.n_nationkey = c.c_nationkey
    WHERE o.o_custkey = c.c_custkey
      AND ns.n_regionkey = nc.n_regionkey
      AND ns.n_nationkey <> nc.n_nationkey
)

part.raw_sql:
SELECT p.*
FROM part p
WHERE NOT EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM lineitem l
    WHERE l.l_partkey = p.p_partkey
      AND l.l_quantity > 200
)
part.predicate:
NOT EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM lineitem l
    WHERE l.l_partkey = p.p_partkey
      AND l.l_quantity > 200
)

supplier.raw_sql:
SELECT s.*
FROM supplier s
WHERE NOT EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM partsupp ps
    JOIN part p ON p.p_partkey = ps.ps_partkey
    WHERE ps.ps_suppkey = s.s_suppkey
      AND p.p_retailprice < 500
)
supplier.predicate:
NOT EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM partsupp ps
    JOIN part p ON p.p_partkey = ps.ps_partkey
    WHERE ps.ps_suppkey = s.s_suppkey
      AND p.p_retailprice < 500
)

3.sql:
select
        l_orderkey,
        sum(l_extendedprice * (1 - l_discount)) as revenue,
        o_orderdate,
        o_shippriority
from
        customer,
        orders,
        lineitem
where
        c_mktsegment = 'FURNITURE'
        and c_custkey = o_custkey
        and l_orderkey = o_orderkey
        and o_orderdate < date '1995-01-01'
        and l_shipdate > date '1995-01-01'
group by
        l_orderkey,
        o_orderdate,
        o_shippriority
order by
        revenue desc,
        o_orderdate

FROM orders o
JOIN lineitem l

GROUP BY o.o_orderkey,

         o.o_orderdate,
         o.o_orderpriority,
         o.o_clerk,
         o.o_shippriority,
         o.o_comment
HAVING SUM(l.l_extendedprice * (1 - l.l_discount)) > 100000

12.sql:
select
        l_shipmode,
        sum(case
                when o_orderpriority = '1-URGENT'
                        or o_orderpriority = '2-HIGH'
                        then 1
                else 0
        end) as high_line_count,
        sum(case
                when o_orderpriority <> '1-URGENT'
                        and o_orderpriority <> '2-HIGH'
                        then 1
                else 0
        end) as low_line_count
from
        orders,
        lineitem
where
        o_orderkey = l_orderkey
        and l_shipmode = 'SHIP'
        and l_commitdate < l_receiptdate
        and l_shipdate < l_commitdate
        and l_receiptdate >= date '1995-01-01'
        and l_receiptdate < date '1995-01-01' + interval '1' year
group by
        l_shipmode
order by
        l_shipmode

orders.raw_sql:
SELECT o.*
FROM orders o
JOIN lineitem l
     ON l.l_orderkey = o.o_orderkey
GROUP BY o.o_orderkey,
         o.o_custkey,
         o.o_orderstatus,
         o.o_totalprice,
         o.o_orderdate,
         o.o_orderpriority,
         o.o_clerk,
         o.o_shippriority,
         o.o_comment
HAVING SUM(l.l_extendedprice * (1 - l.l_discount)) > 100000
orders.predicate: ( SELECT SUM(l.l_extendedprice * (1 - l.l_discount)) FROM lineitem l WHERE l.l_orderkey = o.o_orderkey ) > 100000

17.sql:
select sum(l_extendedprice) / 7.0 as avg_yearly
from
        lineitem,
        part
where
        p_partkey = l_partkey
        and p_brand = 'Brand#53'
        and p_container = 'MED BAG'
        and l_quantity < (
                select
                        0.7 * avg(l_quantity)
                from
                        lineitem
                where
                        l_partkey = p_partkey
        )

part.raw_sql:
SELECT p.*
FROM part p
WHERE NOT EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM lineitem l
    WHERE l.l_partkey = p.p_partkey
      AND l.l_quantity > 200
)
part.predicate:
NOT EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM lineitem l
    WHERE l.l_partkey = p.p_partkey
      AND l.l_quantity > 200
)

18.sql:
select
        c_name,
        c_custkey,
        o_orderkey,
        o_orderdate,
        o_totalprice,
        sum(l_quantity)
from
        customer,
        orders,
        lineitem
where
        o_orderkey in (
                select
                        l_orderkey
                from
                        lineitem
                group by
                        l_orderkey having
                                sum(l_quantity) > 300
        )
        and c_custkey = o_custkey
        and o_orderkey = l_orderkey
group by
        c_name,
        c_custkey,
        o_orderkey,
        o_orderdate,
        o_totalprice
order by
        o_totalprice desc,
        o_orderdate
